steps.title: Open the definition
steps.content: The phrase the cellular organs that generate energy from light defines chloroplasts. A dash already follows that defining phrase, so the blank needs matching punctuation before it.

steps.title: Match the closing dash
steps.content: Choice A leaves the definition unmarked. Choice B uses a semicolon, which cannot pair with the later dash. Choice C uses a comma, creating mismatched punctuation. The remaining choice supplies the opening dash for the appositive. The answer is D.
